query:
SELECT r.id as res_id, r.product_name, r.booking_date, r.people, r.amount_paid, r.amount_total, 
       r.customer_name, r.customer_email, r.customer_phone, r.merchant_order
FROM reservations r
WHERE r.customer_name LIKE '%Rata%'
LIMIT 5;
